message:
✨ Add local search to more list-based cards

- DeploymentIssues: Search by name, namespace, cluster, reason, message
- CRDHealth: Search by name, group, version, scope across all clusters
- NamespaceEvents: Search by message, object, namespace, type, reason

CRDHealth now shows CRDs from all clusters when no specific cluster is
selected, allowing global search across the entire environment.

Part of Phase 2, Item 23: Search in List Cards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
